scope.summary: E4 wires the operator/dashboard e2e acceptance to the existing R3 live browser lane and makes that lane first-class in the e2e orchestrator and inventory.
out_of_scope: No parallel dashboard browser harness was added; the coverage and orchestrator point at R3's existing rig lane.
No live Oracle schema or database behavior is claimed; this lane exercises the real HTTP listener, dashboard pairing, operator action POST, and SSE resume with oracle_capabilities.

entry_points.name: R3 live browser lane
entry_points.trace: `timeout 900 env NODE_PATH=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules bash scripts/rig/rig_browser_lane.sh run --log` exited 0: omcpb built oraclemcp, Playwright ran 2 Chromium tests, dashboard 403 returned a uniform ErrorEnvelope, Chromium paired via POST -> 303 -> /, browser action POST returned 200, and EventSource resumed with Last-Event-ID.

entry_points.name: R3 browser artifact
entry_points.trace: `target/e2e/browser-lane/run-1784715371087-ad678b13-a6cb-4368-87f8-1e7f70c50c96/browser-lane-result.json` records dashboard_403.status=403, dashboard_403.error_class=POLICY_DENIED, browser_pairing.status=303, action_status=200, action_tool=oracle_capabilities, and sse_event_ids=[operator/1, operator/2]; sha256=89bac33611a2237bbc13b0123ca7f415a972b62415bb5b5e91edb4e3108fa350.

entry_points.name: e2e run-all registration
entry_points.trace: `timeout 300 bash scripts/e2e/run_all.sh --log --dry-run` exited 0 and reported `e2e summary: pass=14 fail=0 skipped=16 total=30`; the additional pass is the R3 browser lane dispatched by run_all with its explicit `run` subcommand.

entry_points.name: R3 fixture discovery
entry_points.trace: `NODE_PATH=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules/.bin/playwright test --config web/playwright.live-serve.config.ts --list` exited 0 and listed the existing 2 Chromium R3/C4 tests.

entry_points.name: E4 harness contract
entry_points.trace: `timeout 480 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp --test e2e_harness dashboard_browser_lane_e2e_is_registered_without_parallel_harness -- --nocapture` exited 0: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored. The test asserts run_all dispatches scripts/rig/rig_browser_lane.sh, uses the explicit run subcommand, and does not add a parallel scripts/e2e/dashboard_browser harness.

limitations: The live artifact is local under target/ and is not committed; the committed evidence records the exact artifact path, summarized fields, and SHA-256 digest in the trace.
No full workspace cargo gate is claimed from this shared checkout.
